name: @decentralchain/protobuf-serialization
description: Official Protocol Buffers schema definitions and multi-language bindings for the DecentralChain blockchain protocol — encoding/decoding transactions, blocks, events, and gRPC APIs.

scripts.generate: pbjs -t static-module --force-long --no-create --no-verify --no-convert --no-delimited --no-beautify -w es6 --root decentralchain --path proto -o dist/index.js "proto/waves/**/*.proto"
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && npm run generate && npm run generate:types && npm run generate -- --no-comments && npm run fix:imports
scripts.fix:imports: node -e "import{readFileSync as r,writeFileSync as w}from'fs';let js=r('dist/index.js','utf8');js=js.replace('import * as \$protobuf from \"protobufjs/minimal\"','import \$protobuf from \"protobufjs/minimal.js\"');w('dist/index.js',js);let dts=r('dist/index.d.ts','utf8');dts=dts.replace('from \"protobufjs\"','from \"protobufjs/minimal.js\"');w('dist/index.d.ts',dts)"
scripts.validate: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm run lint:check && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:publint && npm run check:exports && npm run check:size
scripts.bulletproof: biome check --write . && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.bulletproof:check: biome check . && npm run typecheck && npm run test

author: DecentralChain
